removals.reason: Raw Longbridge accordion facade was replaced by moon_ui::MoonAccordion.
Raw Longbridge alert facade was replaced by moon_ui::MoonAlert.
Raw Longbridge dialog facade was replaced by moon_ui::MoonDialog and MoonWindowExt::open_moon_dialog/open_unique_moon_dialog.
Raw Longbridge menu facade is not a MoonReady app API; menu/AppMenuBar remains a pending design decision in NewControls.
Raw Longbridge notification facade was replaced by moon_ui::MoonNotification.
Raw Longbridge popover facade is not needed because moon_ui::MoonPopover is the public API.
Raw Longbridge progress facade was replaced by moon_ui::MoonProgress.
Raw Longbridge tag facade was replaced by moon_ui::MoonTag.
Raw Longbridge accordion exports were replaced by moon_ui::MoonAccordion.
Raw Longbridge alert exports were replaced by moon_ui::MoonAlert.
Raw Longbridge dialog exports were replaced by moon_ui::MoonDialog.
Raw Longbridge menu exports were removed until a Moon menu/AppMenuBar contract exists.
Raw Longbridge notification exports were replaced by moon_ui::MoonNotification.
Raw Longbridge popover exports were removed in favor of moon_ui::MoonPopover.
Raw Longbridge progress exports were replaced by moon_ui::MoonProgress.
Raw Longbridge tag exports were replaced by moon_ui::MoonTag.
Raw Longbridge Theme must not be a top-level application API; MoonTheme owns the typed theme bridge.
The raw moon_ui::components escape hatch was removed; applications must use Moon-facing public APIs from moon_ui::*.
Raw scroll exports were replaced by moon_ui::MoonScrollableElement and Moon scroll wrappers.
Raw scroll module under moon_ui::components was removed with the escape hatch.
Raw theme exports were replaced by MoonTheme, MoonThemeConfig, MoonThemeTokens, MoonPalette and MoonMetrics.
Raw theme module under moon_ui::components was removed; MoonTheme owns application theme access.

removals.signature: pub use gpui_component::{ Disableable, GlobalState, InteractiveElementExt, StyledExt, Theme, ThemeMode, WindowExt, init, locale, measure, measure_if, set_locale, };
removals.reason: Raw Longbridge utility trait bundle was removed from the app facade; Moon-facing exports cover supported application use.
MoonRoot is now the real root type; Root remains only as a backward-compatible alias.
